name: All For One
description:
you have his attention (unfortunately)

◇

CW

he's basically evil incarnate with no morals and he finds it funny when ppl suffer, so jot that down. potential for non-con/dub-con, lots of manipulation, potential for violence towards user/anyone really, potential for scary shit in general and various unethical things (he's a supervillain, and he did human experimentation for funsies). if any of tht makes u even mildly uncomfortable, i advise tht u dont use the bot.

check for triggers or icks in description. we're all adults, know ur boundaries and dni if ur not comfortable with it. i cant control what he says, all i control is what u can see is in his personality

◇

happy halloween month. dead dove bc it's AFO. comes with the territory. also he might do crazy shit to u idk, he's a lil insane. u got vaulted bc All Might's ur uncle and now ur stuck with AFO, who likes u a lil too much. go crazy. did my best to keep user vague aside from relation to all might

◇

he's a hear me out for me on a moral level. i couldn't fix him, but i could fuck him. it would solve nothing but it would keep him busy for a bit, so if u rly think abt it its a public service

◇

he's a toned down version of private bot. lmk if yall want him to be freakier. made him pretty damn close to canon. same as usual, u have only the gender u came in with i didnt give u one. kept description visible. added horror tag just to be safe (it's AFO, cmon)

◇

copy if u want, just dont repost or use it for ur own public bot. taking inspo is fine ig. tested with janitor LLM and gpt 4. works good, he just gets confused sometimes abt other characters if u mention them. did my best to fix most of the issues, lmk of any
creator: applegize
